subtitle: Industrial Identity Gateway

mfa_setup.title: Mandatory Security
mfa_setup.description: Your account requires Multi-Factor Authentication (2FA) to access protected systems. Set it up now to continue.
mfa_setup.grace_banner: ACTIVE GRACE PERIOD: You have {count} permitted bypass logins remaining. Deadline: {expiry}.

error_locked: Account temporarily locked for security. Please try again in 15 minutes.

federated.subtitle: FEDERATED IDENTITY GATEWAY
federated.contact_admin: Contact your system administrator to enable SSO.
federated.select_provider: Select your corporate provider to continue
federated.error_init: Failed to initiate authentication. Please try again.

mfa.description: Enter the security code generated by your TOTP application to authorize access.

request_reset.subtitle: Identity Restoration Protocol
request_reset.description: Enter your Identity_Principal (Email) to receive a high-priority recovery link.
request_reset.success: If the identity is recognized, a restoration link will be sent shortly.

reset_password.subtitle: Security Credentials Update
